title: MiniModList
description: A simple server-side mod listing command. (/mods)
body:
# MiniModList

A simple server-side mod listing command. (/mods)

## Commands | Command | Description | |------------------|------------------------------------| | `/mods []` | Show mods installed on the server. | ## Installation Requires the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). Drop the mod `.jar` into your `mods` folder. No configuration required.
